---
title: "Posters"
format: html
engine: knitr
---

::: {.centered-content}
![3rd Joint Congress of Evolutionary Biology 2024 - Montreal, Canada](posters/EVOL_2024.jpg){fig-align="center"}

![WSL Social Science Day - Birmensdorf, Switzerland](posters/WSL_2021.png){fig-align="center"}

![Australasian Evolution Society Meeting 2019 - Sydney, Australia](posters/AES_2019.jpg){fig-align="center"}
:::
